Team,

From Aurora to Newtown to Orlando to Parkland, we've seen assault weapons devastate our communities and leave countless families to endure the unimaginable heartbreak of losing a loved one to gun violence.

And the NRA and the Members of Congress they have in their pocket will say that nothing can be done.

These horrors won't end until we stop accepting this as our new normal way of life.

Will you join me in demanding that Congress finally take action to ban assault weapons once and for all? Click here to sign the petition and make your demands heard.

These tragedies are senseless and preventable. The only reason they continue to plague our country is that lawmakers continue to kowtow to the NRA. It's time to change that.

[_**Sign your name today and demand Congress take action to ban assault weapons.**_](http://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dd2d/693b8b0a/5953086b/72de89e7/2309977436/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/ban-assault-weapons/?code=markey&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fmarkey-assault-weapons-ban%3Frefcode%3D052119%26amount%3D25%26recurring%3Dtrue&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Ed

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Want to join me in DC?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I want to show my appreciation for you. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=2fbb34b93dd86e5abd8c199a9f1ad675650f53ecbdf727c87aa1271f3d57aca3dfb489a40c0154d6935103e8effcf8d5c927077e758d7b96)
---

Friend,

It's been almost four years since I first announced that I was running for President of the United States.

Since then, we have enjoyed INCREDIBLE support from our grassroots conservative supporters. I know that none of our accomplishments would be possible without YOU.

To thank you for your outstanding support over the last few years, I want to offer you a special, once-in-a-lifetime opportunity.

name: Team Joe
subject: Peter - do you want to work with us?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
We want to build the next generation of political talent. | [ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931944e/1cd0ac28/28b8d26d/356cb7ae/1981184832/VEsH/ "https://www.joebiden.com")
---
Peter, we're excited to tell you that Biden for President is hiring! We don't want to just look in the "usual" places for staffers. We are an inclusive campaign, and we want our staff to reflect America.

We want to open this process up to a variety of people with different backgrounds and experiences into our campaign -- people that can bring their story and their passions with them to this team.

[We are hiring for a variety of positions, so we hope you'll check them out or send them to a friend who you think will be a good fit. Click here to see a list of our available job openings »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931944e/1cd0ac28/28b8d26d/356cb7ad/1981184832/VEsE/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Jobs/")

Whether you are looking to enter politics after a long career in another field, or have a family member who is graduating college and wants to get involved, we hope you'll consider applying to join us or forwarding to someone who might want to.

We are also offering internships. All of those internships will be paid positions, because we believe that everyone should have a fair shot at getting involved in this important campaign cycle.

Today's students deserve opportunities to gain real career experience, yet too many are saddled with student loan debt they will be paying years into their adult life. Working without pay is simply not an option for many young, promising students.

**Our campaign is committed to finding talent and building a diverse coalition of voices -- which is why we want to extend this opportunity to people who may not have been asked in the past.**

[So Peter, we're asking: Do you want to work with us to elect Joe Biden or know someone who should be on our team? Click here to see a list of our available job openings and internships »](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931944e/1cd0ac28/28b8d26d/356cb7ad/1981184832/VEsF/ "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Jobs/")

Looking forward to a bright future,

Team Joe

name: Danielle Hirshberg, Team Hickenlooper
subject: Watch John defend reproductive rights:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
It matters that our next president stand up proudly, forcefully and unequivocally for women's rights to control our bodies and our futures--as John does right here. Watch now. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771611/691c9bd/6c30d4c3/11a4e54d/3361860781/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

I want to get personal for a second.

I'm 26, part of a generation that has always enjoyed the protections of _Roe v. Wade_. But now, state by state, we're seeing continuous, relentless attacks on reproductive rights and abortion access. And, like so many women across the country, I'm _gravely_ concerned about what could happen to those rights if and when Donald Trump's two new Supreme Court justices get to weigh in.

**It matters that our next president stand up proudly, forcefully, and unequivocally for women 's rights to control our bodies and our futures--as John does right here. Watch now.**
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771611/691c9bd/6c30d4c3/11a4e54a/3361860781/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-maddow?refcode=em_fr_20190608_BK_20190608-watch-DH-maddowbump-ndnr_ndnr_i1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

John (or "Gov," as we call him) doesn't just _believe_ in reproductive rights--he has _acted_ on those beliefs. As Governor of Colorado, he implemented a groundbreaking program that ensured **long-acting reversible contraceptive access ( "LARC") for all women across the state. Teen pregnancies plunged and the state saved $70 million.**

As president, he'll work to repeal the Hyde Amendment (which massively restricts federal funding for abortion access and disproportionately affects low-income women) **and choose Supreme Court Justices who accept _Roe_ as settled law.**

I'm so proud to be on Gov's team because he cares so deeply and genuinely about people's well-being. John remembers life before _Roe_ --and he's committed to making sure the horrors of that time are never repeated.

[**_Watch John speak about his commitment to reproductive rights on Rachel Maddow. Then, can you make your first donation to help us grow our momentum and keep a spotlight on this fight?_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771611/691c9bd/6c30d4c3/11a4e54b/3361860781/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-maddow?refcode=em_fr_20190608_BK_20190608-watch-DH-maddowbump-ndnr_ndnr_l1&recurring=auto&email=&firstname=&lastname=&city=&state=&zip=&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

Thank you,

Danielle

Danielle Hirshberg
Creative Director
Hickenlooper 2020

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Resolute Reads
body:
"President Donald Trump extolled U.S. veterans gathered in Normandy on the 75th anniversary of D-Day as the ‘pride of our nation’ in a reverential..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=df7b20d2ea&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_REAL NEWS PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | ['You're the Pride of Our Nation,' Donald Trump Tells Veterans on 75th D-Day Anniversary in Normandy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=26d120c204&e=3ee4985eea)
-_USA Today_
“President Donald Trump extolled U.S. veterans gathered in Normandy on the 75th anniversary of D-Day as the ‘pride of our nation’ in a reverential address Thursday,” John Fritze and David Jackson report. “Trump leaned over to embrace one of the World War II veterans who shared the stage with him at the Normandy American Cemetery and Memorial. He heaped praise on the troops who stormed Omaha and other beaches on the French coast, battling through heavy German fire to claim a beachhead and turn the course of the war.”

**In photos:** [President Trump honors the day that changed history](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4116b40b91&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [US Makes Deal with Mexico on Tariffs, Immigration, Trump Announces](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bb33a98973&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“The U.S. has reached an agreement with Mexico that heads off the start of tariffs on Monday,” Vandana Rambaran reports. “The deal, announced by President Trump via tweet on Friday night, is said to include plans to return migrants seeking asylum to Mexico, where they will remain until their claims can be processed.”
---
|
---
| [Trump, Queen Elizabeth Toast to Historic US-UK Relationship at State Banquet](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b2a52935f6&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Hill_
“President Trump attended a state banquet on Monday hosted by Queen Elizabeth II, where the two leaders hailed the historic importance of their countries' relationship,” Brett Samuels writes. “On behalf of all Americans, I offer a toast to the eternal friendship of our people, the vitality of our nations, and to the long cherished and truly remarkable reign of Her Majesty, the Queen,” the President said.

**🎬****Watch:** [President Trump and the First Lady at Buckingham Palace ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=30c44d95bc&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [New Border Surge Prompts 10% Jump in 2019 Prediction to 1,072,000 Illegal Immigrants](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f96bfb787a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“Calling the surprising May surge in illegal immigrant arrests on the border the ‘worst case scenario,’ a top immigration analyst has boosted the expected level of crossings 10%, to over 1 million,” Paul Bedard reports. “U.S. Customs and Border Protection on Wednesday revealed that May apprehensions topped 144,000. This year has seen 676,315 apprehensions so far, up 99% over this time last year.”
---
|
---
| [Trump and First Lady Host Dinner for Prince Charles and Duchess Camilla in UK](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b53f8ac912&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“President Trump and first lady Melania Trump hosted a dinner for Prince Charles and Duchess of Cornwall Camilla Parker Bowles on Tuesday night at Winfield House, a mansion in London which is the official residence of the United States ambassador to the United Kingdom,” Talia Kaplan reports.

🎬 **Watch:** [The President and First Lady on day 2 of their State Visit to the U.K. ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4b3982ceee&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [Fetal Tissue Research, an Abhorrent and Needless Use of Taxpayer Money, is Done](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=89ccbf0373&e=3ee4985eea)
-_Washington Examiner_
“On Wednesday, the Department of Health and Human Services announced it would end the use of human fetal tissue from elective abortions for medical research,” Mary Vought writes. “For over 25 years, Congress has allowed the National Institutes of Health to dole out what now amounts to more than $100 million each year to researchers who utilize the fetal tissue of aborted babies. There is little to show for this money.”
---
|
---
| [Congress Needs to Back America’s Workers and Approve Trump’s Trade Deal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2692ba313a&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Daily Caller_
“In 1993, very few Americans had a cellphone, and no one had ever heard of buying a book on Amazon”—and yet that year marked “the last time Congress meaningfully debated trade between our two North American partners,” Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) writes. That’s why President Trump recently renegotiated NAFTA, a trade agreement that’s woefully out of date. Democrats and Republicans alike now have an opportunity to replace it with a better deal—“one that includes a minimum wage for Mexican auto workers and provisions to protect American jobs from unfairly traded Chinese products.”
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3ad520cf6e&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd617817f0&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=f36d764f6a)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

body:
| [](conoleforcongress.com)

| | Francis is running for Congress to challenge the power of special interests and ensure that every American has access to quality, affordable health care.

[_**Add your name here if you agree that all Americans deserve access to affordable health care.**_](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/every-american-deserves-high-quality-affordable-health-care-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=1+-+Add+your+name+here+if+you+agree+that+all&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2")

\----Begin Forwarded Message----

We live in a country where good people needlessly suffer because of soaring health insurance and drug costs.

Every American deserves high-quality, affordable health care.

Our mission to make that a reality is only possible if we defeat politicians like John Katko -- who voted against reforms that would have limited the power of the health insurance and drug industries to influence our government.

[**_Sign here if you agree that our health care system should be designed to work for Americans, not make special interests rich -> _**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/every-american-deserves-high-quality-affordable-health-care-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=2+-+Sign+here+if+you+agree+that+our+health+c&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2") [Demand Affordable Health Care](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/every-american-deserves-high-quality-affordable-health-care-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=3+-+Demand+Affordable+Health+Care&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2") Our friends, family, and neighbors deserve to be taken care of when they are sick. No American should go broke because they or a family member gets sick.

That's why it's so important that we stand together and change the way that Washington works.

[**_Add your name now if you agree that every American should have access to quality, affordable health care!_**](https://conole.bsd. "https://conole.bsd.net/page/s/every-american-deserves-high-quality-affordable-health-care-?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=conole&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+now+if+you+agree+that+ever&utm_campaign=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2&source=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2&refcode=FC_EM_PT_RDX_190608_1_2")

Thank you for being part of this mission.

Yours in service,

Francis Conole |
---|---|---

A fourth-generation Syracusan and Iraq War veteran, he has dedicated his life to service and sacrifice. subject: Want to stay in touch? Here's how:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper 2020
body:
Can you quickly fill out this form that'll help us keep you posted about events, meetups, and volunteer opportunities in your area? | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771616/691c9bd/6c34521f/11a4da1a/2188422786/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooper2020-130kdonors?refcode=em_template")
---
| Hey there,

With the debates less than three weeks away, we're ramping up our efforts to get our message out all across the country. One way we're doing that is letting you all know when John's on the road and talking to voters one on one--which is exactly what he's doing this weekend!

**(**[**_Want to stay posted on when John 's stopping by your neighborhood? Help us out by filling out this form._**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771616/691c9bd/6c34521f/11a4da1b/2188422786/VEsE/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/stay-in-touch?source=20190608")**)**

For the next couple days, John will be hitting the ground in Iowa, from Boone to Cedar Rapids to Mason City, for serious conversations on topics ranging from gun reform and rural revitalization to the opioid crisis.

John's eager to hear folks weigh in with their stories and concerns, as well as share what he learned from tackling these issues as Governor of Colorado.

But there's just one hitch: in every community we visit, John leaves wishing he could have talked to even more people (he doesn't wear out easily!)

That's where you come in. [**_Can you quickly fill out this form that 'll help us keep you posted about events, meetups, and volunteer opportunities in your area? John may even give you a call from the road (if you see area code 720, pick up!)_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771616/691c9bd/6c34521f/11a4da1b/2188422786/VEsF/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/stay-in-touch?source=20190608")

Thanks,
Team Hickenlooper [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771616/691c9bd/6c34521f/11a4da1b/2188422786/VEsC/ "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/stay-in-touch?source=20190608")

name: Bernie 2020
subject: Donate ANYTHING, get Bernie’s new book
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie 2020
body:
A limited-time offer:

# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=1648%2E150750%2EJ78lUk)
Bernie’s got a new book. It’s called “Where We Go From Here.” It’s his blueprint for 2020. What we talk about, how we can win, why we need a political revolution — and what’s going to happen for our country when we win.
And we’re making a special offer — a unique one, but one that we think will give the most people the opportunity to read Bernie’s blueprint, and help fund our campaign at the same time. So here goes.
[**Contribute ANY amount of money to our campaign that you think is fair, and we’ll send you a copy of “Where We Go From Here.” Really. Any amount.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190608-1-60&t=2&akid=1648%2E150750%2EJ78lUk) [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190608-1-60&t=3&akid=1648%2E150750%2EJ78lUk)
[GET BERNIE'S BOOK](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190608-1-60&t=4&akid=1648%2E150750%2EJ78lUk)
We have two goals: fund our campaign for president, and have as many people as possible read Bernie’s message.
It costs about 10 bucks to buy the book at cost and to ship it. And it’s going to take a lot more to run our campaign for president.
We know some people may be only to contribute a little bit. That’s OK. We still want you to get the book. But if you can contribute more than you might otherwise for this book, you’ll help our campaign AND help Bernie’s message get out to others who can’t afford to give much.
[**Chip in what you think is fair for our campaign and we’ll send you Bernie’s latest book.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/14754?refcode=em190608-1-60&t=5&akid=1648%2E150750%2EJ78lUk)
Thanks,
Faiz Shakir
Campaign Manager

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Presidential candidates like Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Joe Biden
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
Presidential candidates like Bernie Sanders, Elizabeth Warren, and Joe Biden are out there telling you about their platforms, their policies, and yes, asking for money.
That's good -- I'm glad that we have so many diverse and qualified voices vying for our party's nomination. No matter who our nominee is, the presidential race will be an expensive one.
**But a Democratic President can only be so effective without a Senate that supports her or him.** The Senate will confirm or reject our next President's Supreme Court nominees, and it will determine what bills comes to a vote.
We CAN win back the Senate next year. We have amazing candidates running to unseat Republicans in states like Arizona, Colorado, and Texas, and I'm looking forward to seeing more announce. We also have some Democratic Senators up for reelection who will face competitive fights to protect their seats.
**Democratic Senate candidates need your support every bit as much as your favorite presidential ones do, everyone. It 's the only way we'll regain control.**
[**Democrats are counting on you, and I 'd be so appreciative if you could please give $3 or whatever you can to help win back the Senate. With so much at stake, a gift of any amount would be extremely meaningful.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc22a/2a380d31/392b6c73/f12556/814309276/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2gtNC1kc2NjIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlMjAxOTA2MDhfMDMyMk1XSDREU0NDLXJzX1JPIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh-4-dscc?refcode=e20190608_0322MWH4DSCC-rs_RO&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

With every good wish,
Senator Maggie Hassan

name: Dick Durbin
subject: National Gun Violence Awareness Weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
**[We must speak out and demand an end to gun violence. Add your name now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cab/42ab3cf4/63022005/135d6f01/127778654/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/demand-an-end-to-gun-violence?source=em190608&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Peter,
Hadiya Pendleton was only 15 years old when she was senselessly killed in Chicago. Tragically, she is one of tens of thousands of Americans who lose their lives to gun violence every year.
In Hadiya's honor, I joined Senator Tammy Duckworth and Congresswoman Robin Kelly to introduce a resolution declaring this weekend National Gun Violence Awareness Weekend. Additionally, we have declared June to be known as National Gun Violence Awareness Month.
**[Will you join us in the movement to end gun violence? Add your name right now.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cab/42ab3cf4/63022005/135d6f01/127778654/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/demand-an-end-to-gun-violence?source=em190608&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
Chicago and communities across the country are facing devastating gun violence that is claiming far too many lives. They've been calling for sensible gun reforms for years now.
We can't afford for this to be a partisan issue. I'm urging our Republican colleagues to finally come to the table and work with Democrats to keep our communities safe from gun violence.
**[Add your name now to stand with me in this fight and put an end to gun violence.](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cab/42ab3cf4/63022005/135d6f01/127778654/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/demand-an-end-to-gun-violence?source=em190608&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
My best,
Dick Durbin
**[Add My Name](http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/m/45ff4cab/42ab3cf4/63022005/135d6f01/127778654/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjM0MjIzIiwiSlNWR1NWSlRWRTVCVFVVbEpRPT0iOiJQZXRlciJ9/ "https://action.dickdurbin.com/page/s/demand-an-end-to-gun-violence?source=em190608&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter")**
